Interface ITrackingServiceDef

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to properties that define a tracking service.

[Guid("1B9C2538-3B1D-11D5-B7E4-00010265ADC5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITrackingServiceDef

Properties

MetaData

Metadata value for the tracking service.

string MetaData { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Name of the tracking service.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ObjectDefinitionName

Name that defines the object in the tracking service.

string ObjectDefinitionName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ObjectSource

Source of the tracking object in the tracking service.

enumObjectSource ObjectSource { get; set; }

Property Value

enumObjectSource

Examples

Sample Snippet

ObjectSourceConnectionString

Connection string of the tracking object's source.

string ObjectSourceConnectionString { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ObservationDefinitionName

Name that defines the observation in the tracking service.

string ObservationDefinitionName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SourceOfGeometry

Source of the geometry included in tracking service.

enumShapeSource SourceOfGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

enumShapeSource
